name: NEMESIS 3D model assets
sourceNote: Original source GLB files were optimized for web delivery and are intentionally not shipped in public production paths.

loadingPolicy.hero: Use a poster/static image first; lazy-load 3D after the hero is visible or after user interaction.
loadingPolicy.desktop: Prefer the desktop variant when connection and GPU look healthy.
loadingPolicy.mobile: Prefer the lite variant by default; upgrade to mobile variant only after user interaction.
loadingPolicy.fallback: If WebGL fails or prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, keep the static poster visible.
